GET_PROTOCOL_TVL.DESCRIPTION: Fetch the total value locked (TVL) for the Kava protocol from DeFiLlama.

GET_KAVA_PRICE.DESCRIPTION: Get the current price and market data for the KAVA token from CoinGecko.

GET_CHAIN_BREAKDOWN.DESCRIPTION: Get the TVL breakdown by chain for the Kava protocol from DeFiLlama.

GET_TVL_HISTORY.DESCRIPTION: Retrieve the last 30 days of historical TVL data for the Kava protocol.

GET_PROTOCOL_STATS.DESCRIPTION: Get key protocol statistics including TVL, chains supported, and category from DeFiLlama.
